TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_smyusÊÑüÊÅ©Á•≠, title = smyusÊÑüÊÅ©Á•≠, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/smyusÊÑüÊÅ©Á•≠} }

S.FORM: pgyan nha loziy ru kiyay balay lga rasun nha ngasal ru san ha smi khu nha la, san nha smi khu lru kbalay squ gaga la, mkayal squ san mha qutux niqan san mha ga mtswe kwara qasa,nanu mtswe lga klayo ta gaga ru aki ta tmalam squ giqas nqu i pincywagan qani ru ana ta muciy nanu maniq lga swalan ta nya utux kayal la muciy ga yasa qu pSyus ta, knwan qu mkayal muciy knwan qu musa ta syun pSyus ta qaniy ga a sonun nha ryax, nanu ryax ru nanu yasa muciy ma Ikoripay lga musa ta ini ga Ikoripay ini ga mpuw bingi lga pSyus ta l'ay muciy lga, mkayal lru nanu zik na pSyus ta qaniy ga a hata i mlata, musa ta mlata ru hata kangi cikay iwan nqu bes nqu Smyus, qaniy ga aki maki tlaman nqu laqi ru kneril muciy qu inlungan nqu mrkyas mlikiy ru likuy ga, nanu sonun nha ryax muciy ma ska byacing qaniy ga hata mgluw musa qzyunam musa kangi cikay san muciy ma Rezo ga qsinuw ga,

pgyan nha loziy ru kiyay balay lga rasun nha ngasal ru san ha smi khu nha la, san nha smi khu lru kbalay squ gaga la, mkayal squ san mha qutux niqan san mha ga mtswe kwara qasa,nanu mtswe lga klayo ta gaga ru aki ta tmalam squ giqas nqu i pincywagan qani ru ana ta muciy nanu maniq lga swalan ta nya utux kayal la muciy ga yasa qu pSyus ta, knwan qu mkayal muciy knwan qu musa ta syun pSyus ta qaniy ga a sonun nha ryax, nanu ryax ru nanu yasa muciy ma Ikoripay lga musa ta ini ga Ikoripay ini ga mpuw bingi lga pSyus ta l'ay muciy lga, mkayal lru nanu zik na pSyus ta qaniy ga a hata i mlata, musa ta mlata ru hata kangi cikay iwan nqu bes nqu Smyus, qaniy ga aki maki tlaman nqu laqi ru kneril muciy qu inlungan nqu mrkyas mlikiy ru likuy ga, nanu sonun nha ryax muciy ma ska byacing qaniy ga hata mgluw musa qzyunam musa kangi cikay san muciy ma Rezo ga qsinuw ga,
S.PHON: p…£jan nƒßa lozij ru kijaj Œ≤alaj l…£a ras~…ïun nƒßa ≈ãas~…ïal ru s~…ïan ƒßa s~…ïmi kƒßu nƒßa la, s~…ïan nƒßa s~…ïmi kƒßu lru kŒ≤alaj s~…ïqu …£a…£a la, mkajal s~…ïqu s~…ïan mƒßa qutux niqan s~…ïan mƒßa …£a mts~…ïwe kwara qas~…ïa,nanu mts~…ïwe l…£a klajo ta …£a…£a ru aki ta tmalam s~…ïqu …£iqas~…ï nqu i pin ¶~ ®jwa…£an qani ru ana ta mu ¶~ ®ij nanu maniq l…£a s~…ïwalan ta nja utux kajal la mu ¶~ ®ij …£a jas~…ïa qu ps~…ïjus~…ï ta, knwan qu mkajal mu ¶~ ®ij knwan qu mus~…ïa ta s~…ïjun ps~…ïjus~…ï ta qanij …£a a s~…ïonun nƒßa rjax, nanu rjax ru nanu jas~…ïa mu ¶~ ®ij ma ikoripaj l…£a mus~…ïa ta ini …£a ikoripaj ini …£a mpuw Œ≤i≈ãi l…£a ps~…ïjus~…ï ta l îaj mu ¶~ ®ij l…£a, mkajal lru nanu zik na ps~…ïjus~…ï ta qanij …£a a ƒßata i mlata, mus~…ïa ta mlata ru ƒßata ka≈ãi ¶~ ®ikaj iwan nqu Œ≤es~…ï nqu s~…ïmjus~…ï, qanij …£a aki maki tlaman nqu laqi ru kneril mu ¶~ ®ij qu inlu≈ãan nqu mrkjas~…ï mlikij ru likuj …£a, nanu s~…ïonun nƒßa rjax mu ¶~ ®ij ma s~…ïka Œ≤ja ¶~ ®i≈ã qanij …£a ƒßata m…£luw mus~…ïa qzjunam mus~…ïa ka≈ãi ¶~ ®ikaj s~…ïan mu ¶~ ®ij ma rezo …£a qs~…ïinuw …£a,
